settings.title: A job board that actually belongs in your WordPress site.

settings.editor: WP Career Board is built on Gutenberg blocks and the WordPress Interactivity API — no shortcodes, no jQuery, no page reloads. Employer dashboards, candidate applications, company profiles, and BuddyPress integration. Free. Included with Reign Theme.

settings.title: Every other WordPress job board plugin is built on technology from 2012.

settings.description_text: Paste [shortcode] on a page and hope it renders correctly with your theme
Loaded globally even on pages with zero job board content

settings.title_text: ✗ Features that should be free cost extra
settings.description_text: Guest applications, GDPR, spam protection — add-ons at $49 each
BuddyPress integration either doesn't exist or needs yet another paid extension

settings.editor: WP Career Board fixes all of this. Block-first. Interactivity API. Free.

settings.title: The only job board plugin built for modern WordPress.

settings.editor: WP Job Manager uses shortcodes. JobBoardWP has no block editor support. WP Career Board was designed from the ground up for Gutenberg 6.9+ — and it's the only one bundled with Reign Theme and with first-class BuddyPress integration.
01

Every screen — job listings, dashboards, application forms, company profiles — is a Gutenberg block. You place them with the block editor, they inherit your theme's design, and there are no shortcodes to memorize.
02

settings.title: The only one built on the Interactivity API

settings.editor: Job filters update without a page reload. Application status changes instantly. All of it runs on the WordPress Interactivity API — the same runtime as the Query Loop block. No external JavaScript framework.
03

settings.title: The only one bundled with Reign Theme

settings.editor: WP Career Board is included with every Reign Theme license. Run the Setup Wizard and your community site has a professional job board — styled to match Reign automatically, with BuddyPress integration from day one.

settings.title: A complete job board. No paid add-ons required.

settings.editor: Keyword, location, type, category, salary range, remote policy — all live, no page reload.
Post and manage jobs. Track applications. Neither role needs wp-admin access.
Five statuses (Submitted → Reviewing → Shortlisted → Rejected / Hired) with automatic email on each change.
Candidates apply with name and email only — no account registration required.
Public company pages — logo, description, website, team size. Candidates see who they're applying to.
Automatic emails on application received, status changed, and job approved. Fully customizable templates.
Invisible spam protection on job form and application form. Personal data export and erasure built in — both free.
Valid structured data on every job page. Eligible for Google Jobs without any SEO plugin.
Job activity in the community feed. Employer and candidate roles as BuddyPress member types. Auto-detected.
Included with Reign Theme · BuddyPress-ready

settings.title: A job board that looks like part of your community

settings.editor: WP Career Board is bundled with Reign Theme and detects BuddyPress automatically. Activate, run the wizard, and the job board adopts Reign's design system — colors, typography, card styles. Job posts appear in the BuddyPress activity stream without any configuration.

icon_list.text: Included in every Reign Theme license — already yours
Reign design system adopted automatically at activation

settings.editor: WP Career Board is permanently free. Every feature listed on this page is included. WP Career Board Pro is a separate paid extension for advanced features.

items.item_title: Is the free version actually free, or is it a limited trial?
Do I get WP Career Board if I have a Reign Theme license?
Will it slow down my site?

settings.editor: Permanently free. The free version is a complete job board — employer and candidate dashboards, application tracking, BuddyPress integration, reCAPTCHA, GDPR, and JobPosting schema are all included. No trial period, no feature locks. WP Career Board Pro is a separate paid product for advanced features like a Kanban pipeline, multiple boards, and Stripe monetization.

Yes. WP Career Board is included with all Reign Theme licenses. Log in to your Wbcom account, go to Downloads, and download WP Career Board. Run the Setup Wizard and the Reign integration activates automatically.

No. WP Career Board works on any WordPress site. BuddyPress is optional — when active, it unlocks activity stream integration, employer and candidate member types, and profile linking. No configuration needed.

No JavaScript framework is loaded. The frontend runs on the WordPress Interactivity API — the same runtime WordPress uses for the Query Loop block. No jQuery, no React bundle, no additional libraries.
It's free — no payment required. If you need the Pro version and it doesn't work for your use case, the Pro license comes with a 30-day money-back guarantee.
Yes. Full documentation covering installation, the Setup Wizard, block placement, settings, integrations, and troubleshooting. Available at store.wbcomdesigns.com/wp-career-board/docs/

settings.title: Add a complete job board to your WordPress site — free.

settings.editor: Included with Reign Theme. Works with BuddyPress, BuddyBoss, and any Gutenberg-compatible theme.
